assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Imported/scanned project shows issues/remediation in web UI.

first_success.outcome: Imported/scanned project shows issues/remediation in web UI.

route_selection.surface: Snyk web app: account + first SCM/project scan
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists. Include documented gates (email verify, payment, credits, domain, approval). Prefer HTTP/cURL when documented; do not prefer local/no-account toolkit shortcuts over hosted onboarding.
